title: Wam's World Builder
description: An immersive mod pack built on Create, Chisels, and fun combat. Vanilla+++ in a way!
body:
This is a custom modpack designed to enhance the Minecraft experience by offering a diverse range of tools and features for comprehensive world creation and editing. This modpack is perfect for players who love to build, design, and modify worlds with precision and creativity, and build massive machines with the power of Create! Don't forget about redesigned combat as well, with Simply Swords.

# Note about Immersive Portals and MiniScaled. 
These mods have caused performance issues in the past, if you run into them, want to negate such, make sure you enable "compatibility mode" in the Immersive Portals config.
